entities.name: SWEET SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species Sorghum bicolor (L.) Monech being studied for genetic diversity.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in genetic characteristics among the sweet sorghum genotypes.

entities.name: RAPD MARKERS
entities.description: Random amplified polymorphic DNA markers used to detect genetic variation.

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: The presence of two or more different alleles at a specific locus, detected at a rate of 93.4 per cent among accessions.

entities.name: GENOTYPES
entities.description: The twenty-seven sweet sorghum germplasm accessions evaluated in the study.
